capabilities.name: Reliability-Centred Maintenance (RCM and FMEA)
capabilities.description: Formalised analysis of how assets fail and which failures matter, used to pick the right maintenance strategy (run-to-fail vs PM vs predictive) per failure mode rather than per asset.

requirements.text: Maintain a Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA) register organized by asset class, documenting all identified failure modes for each asset type.

requirements.text: Capture the chain of failure mode, root cause, effect, and detection method for each identified failure mode.

requirements.text: Calculate and record risk priority number (RPN) or equivalent criticality score for each failure mode using severity, occurrence probability, and detection difficulty.
proxy_refs: Criticality and risk scoring per failure mode (severity × occurrence × detection)

requirements.text: Recommend appropriate maintenance strategy per failure mode: run-to-failure, preventive maintenance, condition-based monitoring, or predictive maintenance.
proxy_refs: Maintenance strategy recommendation per failure mode (RTF, PM, CBM, PdM)

capabilities.name: Reliability Engineering (Bad-Actor Analysis)
capabilities.description: Tools for reliability engineers to analyse historical failure data and identify chronically failing assets ("bad actors") for targeted investigation and elimination of root causes.

proxy_refs: Bad-actor identification by MTBF, cost, or downtime

requirements.text: Track and visualize reliability growth trends following implementation of corrective actions
proxy_refs: Reliability growth tracking after corrective actions

capabilities.name: Shutdown and Turnaround
